title: General Theory of Political Pathology
description: A comparative theory of how embodied symbolic orders respond to crisis through sacrifice, reform, collapse, transformation, stagnation, or hybrid transition.

title: Koenigsberg's Immortal Collective Body
description: Political communities may function as imagined immortal collective bodies for which individual mortal bodies are sacrificed.

title: Sacrifice Law
description: A symbolic order's self-preservation can become self-sacralization and legitimate sacrifice under perceived existential threat.
